entries.observed_outcome: Official Browser/IAB opened the page at 1280x720; the body text contained Heuristic Learning, course outline, runnable examples, case library, and slides navigation with non-empty main content.

Official Browser/IAB opened the route with a 390x844 viewport; the page text contained course map, student, researcher, instructor, and coding-agent paths. The hidden off-canvas sidebar remains outside the viewport as expected, while the main learning path text is readable.
Official Browser/IAB opened the examples page at 1280x720; the page showed GridWorld, Robot Soccer, VizDoom, Traffic, Breakout, Ant Gait, and the light replay boundary for replay-based examples.
Official Browser/IAB opened the slides page at 1280x720; the page showed the three Chinese lecture entries and two Lab entries with non-empty teaching-material content.

Official Browser/IAB opened the machine-readable entrypoints page at 1280x720; the page links to course-manifest.json, completion-audit.json, visual-verification.json, visual-acceptance-log.json, and llms.txt. Direct JSON/TXT route availability is separately covered by npm run docs:routes:check.
Official Browser/IAB opened the completion-audit page at 1280x720; the page showed goal decomposition, required local commands, evidence boundaries, and Browser/IAB visual-acceptance language.
